title: Joey Chestnut to compete in inaugural Saugus Wing Eating Championship
author: Madison Lucchesi
bullets: Joey Chestnut to participate in inaugural Saugus Wing Eating Championship on July 11 at The Brook Casino, Seabrook.
Geoffrey Esper holds the record with 281 wings in 10 minutes, beating Chestnut by 25 wings in 2019.
Saugus Wings are coated in Kowloon's Asian-style barbecue sauce, named for Saugus, Massachusetts.

title: France-Morocco was a fitting end to a spectacular World Cup in Boston
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Boston hosted seven World Cup matches, concluding with France's 2-0 win over Morocco in Foxborough.
France's Kylian Mbappé and Ousmane Dembélé scored to secure a quarterfinal victory in front of 63,811 fans.
Boston's World Cup was notable for Scottish, Norwegian, and Moroccan fan interactions, boosting the city's global profile.

title: Gloucester woman accused of plotting to kill childhood friend using WD-40
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Phyllis Palazzola allegedly attempted to kill her childhood friend Marianna DiMercurio using a WD-40-soaked rag in Gloucester.
DiMercurio claims Palazzola planned to drive them off a bridge; Palazzola later indicted on multiple felony charges.
DiMercurio filed lawsuits seeking $520,000 in damages due to breach of contract and personal injuries from the attack.

title: How a Waltham barber became France’s go-to during the World Cup
author: Emily Turner
bullets: Waltham barber Coco Fernandez became the go-to barber for France's national soccer team during the World Cup.
Fernandez initially connected with the team via a 'random' WhatsApp message and now regularly cuts their hair in Boston.
Fernandez has also provided haircuts for Morocco's national team, and continues to serve both teams during the tournament.

title: Red Sox face lengthy travel issues ahead of series vs. Mets
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: The Boston Red Sox faced a 17-hour travel delay from Chicago to New York before their series against the Mets.
The delay was due to multiple unspecified plane issues; the team departed Chicago at 3 p.m. ET Friday.
The Red Sox are scheduled to play the Mets at 7:15 p.m. ET, with Sonny Gray starting for Boston.

title: Photos: See breathtaking tall ships sail toward Boston
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: Sail Boston 2026, a six-day maritime event, begins July 11, featuring over 60 international tall ships and military vessels.
The event marks the conclusion of the Sail250 tour, with ships arriving from New York to dock at Boston's waterfront.
The Five Sisters Race includes notable participants like Germany's Gorch Fock and the USCG Eagle heading towards Boston.

title: Patriots 2026 position preview: Tight ends edition
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Hunter Henry remains the only returning Patriots tight end with experience playing at the position last season.
The Patriots' tight end group includes rookies Eli Raridon and Tanner Arkin, and former practice squad member CJ Dippre.
Hunter Henry has been a top target for Drake Maye, finishing last season with 60 catches for 768 yards and seven touchdowns.

title: Q&A: Gigi Perez reflects on Berklee, Boston, and a special Fenway week alongside Noah Kahan
author: Heather Alterisio
bullets: Gigi Perez is a Cuban-American singer-songwriter known for her viral hit 'Sailor Song' which topped UK charts.
Perez, a former Berklee student, recently performed at Fenway Park supporting Noah Kahan on his 'The Great Divide' Tour.
Her 2025 debut album 'At The Beach, In Every Life' follows her TikTok-driven rise to fame after her song "Celene".

title: Rideshare passenger attacked by driver en route to Logan, police say
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: A rideshare passenger was allegedly attacked by a driver en route to Logan Airport early Friday morning.
The passenger entered Terminal C with injuries, described by police as resulting from a stabbing, not life-threatening.
Police have identified a 2017 Lexus driven by a Lowell man; no arrests have been made, investigation ongoing.

title: How a chance encounter with a Scotland fan outside Fenway Park became a viral love story
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: Jill Roberts from Marlborough met Scottish fan Tommy Morrison outside Fenway Park during a Red Sox game in June.
Their encounter went viral after Roberts posted a TikTok video, garnering over 620,000 views.
The couple confirmed their relationship and are maintaining it long-distance, with Roberts planning a visit to Scotland.
